lede: A look at June 23 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Lilliana Ketchman and Antony Costa, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Tham Luang cave rescue
events.desc: Twelve boys and an assistant coach from a soccer team in Thailand are trapped in a flooding cave, leading to an 18-day rescue operation.

events.title: NASA
events.desc: NASA's Space Station Processing Facility, a new state-of-the-art manufacturing building for the International Space Station, officially opens at Kennedy Space Center.

events.title: Antarctic Treaty System
events.desc: The Antarctic Treaty System, which sets aside Antarctica as a scientific preserve and limits military activity on the continent, its islands and ice shelves, comes into force.

events.title: 1946 Vancouver Island earthquake
events.desc: The 1946 Vancouver Island earthquake strikes Vancouver Island, British Columbia, Canada.

events.title: Henry Larsen (explorer)
events.desc: Henry Larsen begins the first successful west-to-east navigation of Northwest Passage from Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.

events.title: College Board
events.desc: The College Board administers the first SAT exam.

events.title: Rocky Mountains Park Act
events.desc: The Rocky Mountains Park Act becomes law in Canada creating the nation's first national park, Banff National Park.

events.title: Battle of Plassey
events.desc: Battle of Plassey: Three thousand British troops under Robert Clive defeat a 50,000-strong Indian army under Siraj ud-Daulah at Plassey.

events.title: Reconquista
events.desc: The Spanish Reconquista: In the Battle of Moclín the Emirate of Granada ambush a superior pursuing force, killing most of them in a military disaster for the Kingdom of Castile.

events.title: War of Saint Sabas
events.desc: War of Saint Sabas: In the Battle of Trapani, the Venetians defeat a larger Genoese fleet, capturing all its ships.

births.name: Marie-Thérèse Houphouët-Boigny
births.line: former First Lady of Ivory Coast

deaths.text: Werner Best, German police officer and jurist
Samuel Newitt Wood, American lawyer and politician
